title: IP10 0HT, Valencia Waste Management Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/BW2943IG/V009
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:    Operator name: Valencia Waste Management Limited   Installation name Foxhall Landfill Site   Permit number: EPR/BW2943IG/V009   "
